creator: dkelly@hiwaay.net
text:
As installed exmh-2.0.2 has problems with this date header:
	Date: Sun, 08 Nov 1998, 16:37:35 -0800

Fix: 

The "date.patch" file on the master download site now applies cleanly.
Add "date.patch" to PATCHFILES+= in the Makefile.

Delete patches/patch-ax. It appears to me patch-ax is a precusor to
the current date.patch.

Add "MD5 (exmh-2.0.2/date.patch) = 41fba517e559fbb80a554b81c351eb0a"
to files/md5.



Have submitted this before. Thought I saw it come thru. Checking my
/home/ncvs it appears not to have been applied.
How-To-Repeat: 
insert the above date header into a message file, then view with
exmh-2.0.2.
